CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION TO APPOINT UMPIRE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nicholas W. Yang for petitioner Maria C. Williams and specially appearing for respondent's counsel (via Zoom).

Not contested. The Court confirmed receipt of the proposed order submitted by the parties prior to the hearing.
The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

PETITION TO APPOINT UMPIRE is GRANTED.

Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
